title: Crisp Roasted Spanish Rest Meat Arroz Negro
description: A quick-fix Spanish dish featuring roasted rest meat and Tabasco sauce, served in a pandan leaf wrap. This arroz negro is a raw-friendly and crispy meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the rest meat into small pieces and season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the rest meat until browned.
Add the uncooked rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the rest meat and oil.
Transfer the rice mixture to a large bowl and stir in the Tabasco sauce.
Spoon the rice mixture onto the center of each pandan leaf, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the pandan leaves over the filling to form a tight packet and secure with a toothpick if needed.
Place the packets on a baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the packets from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
